General.Name: Zibuyu Group Ltd
General.Description: Zibuyu Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a cross-border e-commerce company in China. The company offers self-designed apparel, such as kimono, casual blazers, tank tops and shirts, jackets, and dresses for women, as well as shirts for men; footwear; and other products, including electronic devices, stationery, and sporting goods. It sells its products through third-party e-commerce platforms and self-operated online stores. In addition, the company is involved in procurement and sales of products; technical support and operation of website; warehousing, freight forwarding, supply chain management services, design and R&D. Zibuyu Group Limited was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

7.Name: Mr. Cheng  Bing
7.Title: GM of Business Department, Sales Director, VP & GM of Innovation Business
